leadText: The Exercise Ball (Japanese: バランスボール Balance Ball) is a type of picnic item introduced in Generation IX.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Exercise Ball can be brought out during a picnic to be kicked around by the player and their party Pokémon.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S V A big ball designed for exercising. It can work as a seat if you get tired, too.
